extraction.one_line_summary: NIBALI attacked on flat lakeside section 17km after descent, dropped PINOT with repeated accelerations, won by 28 seconds over MOSCON group
tactical_patterns: NIBALI attacked on flat lake section not climbs, exploiting recovery moment after dangerous descent to isolate rivals immediately
Quick-Step prioritized ALAPHILIPPE over VAN AVERMAET when selection happened, revealing hierarchy shift despite latter's better palmares
PINOT signaled attack intention before executing, allowing NIBALI to mark and counter when Pinot visibly suffered
Teams fractured when DE POUS crashed on descent, preventing coordinated chase as FDJ lost organizing rider

rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: attacked twice in rapid succession when PINOT showed weakness, reading opponent fatigue perfectly
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: telegraphed his moves and was on ragged edge when NIBALI countered, lacked explosiveness for repeated accelerations
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: bridged significant gaps alone after lakeside attacks, showing Quick-Step chose correctly between him and VAN AVERMAET
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: described as out of sorts and not selected as Quick-Step leader despite monument pedigree
rider_signals.DE POUS Laurens: negative: crashed badly on descent creating disorganization that enabled NIBALI's lakeside attack timing
